tissue: In healthy human liver tissues, multiple non-histone proteins were identified with acetylation modification...
disease_state: the role of acetylated proteins in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) development remains largely unknown.
sample_source: tumor and normal liver tissues from HCC patients
Here we performed a quantitative acetylome study of tumor and normal liver tissues from HCC patients.
age: The age of patients ranged from 35 to 67, and about 57% of them were HBV positive.
sex: We collected twenty pairs of tumor and normal liver tissues from HCC male patients.
